ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1040 Rhode Island St. S.F.)
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for and with Gene Marchi.

The sale was confirmed at $525,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale and in the Second Supplement. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
